originalTitle: Apple 2027 rumors: AirPods with cameras for AI and the second folding iPhone
summary: Now that we're clear of WWDC and all of the new AI-powered features coming to Apple's platforms, Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman has more details about rumored new hardware, like the camera-equipped AirPods he'd previously written about. He says they are currently on schedule for a late 2027 launch, and that while we're checking out beta […]
content: Now that we’re clear of WWDC and all of the new AI-powered features coming to Apple’s platforms, Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman has more details about rumored new hardware, like the camera-equipped AirPods he’d previously written about. He says they are currently on schedule for a late 2027 launch, and that while we’re checking out beta releases for this fall’s iOS 27 update, the new earbuds are internally being tested with next year’s update, iOS 28. With cameras mounted in their stems and lights to indicate when data is being uploaded to the cloud, they could give the upgraded version of Siri “visual context” about your surroundings, before Apple eventually releases its first pair of smart glasses. Also mentioned is a second-generation foldable phone to follow the model that he says we can expect to see this fall, as an indication that Apple will be committed to the new product category, and, hopefully, find even better ways to take advantage of the extra screens than we’ve seen in the category so far. I like my Pixel 10 Pro Fold, but between apps that fail to adjust for the bigger screen and a smaller battery than the largest standard Pixel 10, it adds a lot of compromises and a hefty price. Gurman also mentioned the long-rumored “20th anniversary” iPhone, dubbed V73 and V74, which he says will follow this year’s iPhone 18 Pro and Pro Max offering similar sizes, but adding a “nearly edge-to-edge display, with curved glass that wraps around the sides.” Meanwhile, the standard iPhone 18 may not launch until next year, while running on an A20 series chip similar to phones planned for release this fall, before the other 2027 phones jump to a 2nm A21 chip, with plans to shift to 1.4nm technology for the A22 Pro, with Apple “considering” using Intel to handle some production along with its usual source, TSMC. This seems to line up with the rumors of the last few years that previewed the arrival of the skinny iPhone Air. But with John Ternus taking over as Apple’s CEO, a RAM and component shortage looming over everything, and AI everywhere, even solidly rumored plans could change.
chineseTitle: 苹果 2027 年传闻：带有 AI 摄像头的 AirPods 和第二款折叠 iPhone
chineseSummary: 现在我们已经了解了 WWDC 以及苹果平台即将推出的所有新的人工智能功能，彭博社记者马克·古尔曼 (Mark Gurman) 获得了有关传闻中的新硬件的更多细节，比如他之前写过的配备摄像头的 AirPods。他表示，它们目前按计划于 2027 年末发布，而我们正在检查测试版 [...]
chineseContent: 现在我们已经了解了 WWDC 以及苹果平台上即将推出的所有新的人工智能功能，彭博社记者马克·古尔曼 (Mark Gurman) 获得了有关传闻中的新硬件的更多细节，比如他之前写过的配备摄像头的 AirPods。他表示，它们目前计划于 2027 年末发布，在我们检查今年秋季 iOS 27 更新的测试版时，新耳机正在内部使用明年的更新 iOS 28 进行测试。在苹果最终发布第一副智能眼镜之前，耳机杆上安装了摄像头，并配有灯光来指示数据何时上传到云端，它们可以为升级版的 Siri 提供有关周围环境的“视觉背景”。还提到了第二代可折叠手机，他说我们预计会在今年秋天看到这款手机，这表明苹果将致力于新产品类别，并希望找到比我们迄今为止在该类别中看到的更好的方式来利用额外的屏幕。我喜欢我的 Pixel 10 Pro Fold，但与最大的标准 Pixel 10 相比，无法适应更大屏幕和更小的电池的应用程序之间，它增加了很多妥协和高昂的价格。 Gurman 还提到了传闻已久的“20 周年”iPhone，被称为 V73 和 V74，他表示这两款 iPhone 将继今年的 iPhone 18 Pro 和 Pro Max 之后提供类似的尺寸，但增加了“几乎无边的显示屏，并带有环绕两侧的曲面玻璃”。与此同时，标准版 iPhone 18 可能要到明年才会推出，同时运行与计划今年秋季发布的手机类似的 A20 系列芯片，之后其他 2027 年手机将转向 2 纳米 A21 芯片，并计划为 A22 Pro 转向 1.4 纳米技术，苹果“考虑”使用英特尔来处理一些产品。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
